title: hieracium ochrophyllum
intro: Hieracium ochrophyllum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium ochrophyllum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications in traditional and modern herbal medicine.
